auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Autobound Signal API key sent with the x-api-key header. Create or copy it from the Signal API dashboard at https://signalapi.autobound.ai.

actions.name: enrich_company
actions.description: Enrich one company with Autobound company-level signals.

domain.description: The company domain to enrich, for example stripe.com.

companyName.description: The company name to enrich when the domain is unavailable.

linkedinUrl.description: The company LinkedIn URL to enrich when other identifiers are unavailable.

items.description: The canonical Autobound signal type slug or an accepted legacy alias.

signalTypes.description: The signal types Autobound should include in the enrichment response.

detectedAfter.description: Only return signals detected on or after this timestamp.

limit.description: The maximum number of signals to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for enriching one company with Autobound signals.

name.description: The company name returned by Autobound.

domain.description: The company domain returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The company LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

company.description: A normalized company object returned by Autobound.

signalType.description: The canonical Autobound signal type slug or an accepted legacy alias.

association.description: The Autobound signal association for filtering or classification.

name.description: The company name returned by Autobound.

domain.description: The company domain returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The company LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

anyOf.description: A normalized company object returned by Autobound.

email.description: The contact email returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The contact LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

name.description: The contact name returned by Autobound.

title.description: The contact title returned by Autobound.

name.description: The company name returned by Autobound.

domain.description: The company domain returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The company LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

company.description: A normalized company object returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

anyOf.description: A normalized contact object returned by Autobound.

data.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

items.description: A normalized signal record returned by Autobound.

signals.description: The normalized signals returned for the company.

total.description: The total number of signals returned in this response.

additionalProperties.description: The number of returned signals for one signal type.

byType.description: The count of returned signals grouped by signal type.

anyOf.description: Summary counts for the returned Autobound signals.
The Autobound coverage metadata for this enrichment.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for Autobound company enrichment.

actions.name: enrich_contact
actions.description: Enrich one contact with Autobound contact-level signals and employer context.

contactEmail.description: The contact email address to enrich.

contactLinkedinUrl.description: The contact LinkedIn URL to enrich when the email is unavailable.

items.description: The canonical Autobound signal type slug or an accepted legacy alias.

signalTypes.description: The signal types Autobound should include in the enrichment response.

detectedAfter.description: Only return signals detected on or after this timestamp.

limit.description: The maximum number of signals to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for enriching one contact with Autobound signals.

email.description: The contact email returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The contact LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

name.description: The contact name returned by Autobound.

title.description: The contact title returned by Autobound.

items.description: A normalized signal record returned by Autobound.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Get the authenticated Autobound Signals account details and current credit balance.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for loading the current Autobound account.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for Autobound account details.

actions.name: list_signal_types
actions.description: List Autobound signal types and optionally include live counts and refresh cadence metadata.

includeCounts.description: Whether Autobound should include per-type counts and cadence metadata.

association.description: The Autobound signal association for filtering or classification.

since.description: Only include type counts for signals detected on or after this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Autobound signal types.

type.description: The canonical Autobound signal type slug or an accepted legacy alias.

association.description: The Autobound signal association for filtering or classification.

description.description: The description for this Autobound signal type.

count.description: The number of available signals for this type.

refreshCadence.description: The refresh cadence reported by Autobound.

refreshHours.description: The nominal refresh period in hours.

items.description: A normalized Autobound signal type entry.

signalTypes.description: The normalized Autobound signal type entries.

totalSignals.description: The total live signal count across returned types.

countedAt.description: When Autobound counted the live signal totals.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for Autobound signal type listing.

actions.name: search_companies
actions.description: Search companies that match Autobound company-level signal filters.

items.description: The canonical Autobound signal type slug or an accepted legacy alias.

signalTypes.description: The Autobound signal types that companies must match.

detectedAfter.description: Only include companies with matching signals detected on or after this timestamp.

detectedBefore.description: Only include companies with matching signals detected before this timestamp.

limit.description: The maximum number of companies to return.

signalsPerEntity.description: How many of each company's most recent signals to attach.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching companies by Autobound signal filters.

name.description: The company name returned by Autobound.

domain.description: The company domain returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The company LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

signalCount.description: The number of matching signals for this company.

mostRecentSignalAt.description: When the most recent matching signal was detected for this company.

signalType.description: The canonical Autobound signal type slug or an accepted legacy alias.

association.description: The Autobound signal association for filtering or classification.

name.description: The company name returned by Autobound.

domain.description: The company domain returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The company LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

anyOf.description: A normalized company object returned by Autobound.

email.description: The contact email returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The contact LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

name.description: The contact name returned by Autobound.

title.description: The contact title returned by Autobound.

name.description: The company name returned by Autobound.

domain.description: The company domain returned by Autobound.

linkedinUrl.description: The company LinkedIn URL returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

company.description: A normalized company object returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

anyOf.description: A normalized contact object returned by Autobound.

data.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

items.description: A normalized signal record returned by Autobound.

signals.description: The attached most recent signals for this company.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by Autobound.

items.description: One company result returned by Autobound company search.

companies.description: The companies returned by Autobound search.

offset.description: The result offset returned by Autobound.

limit.description: The result limit returned by Autobound.

hasMore.description: Whether Autobound has another page of company results.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for Autobound company search.
